items.briefing:
Australia's Privacy Commissioner has ruled that Optus breached privacy laws by listing customer details in White Pages without proper consent — a reminder that your personal data held by telcos has legal protections. Separately, a Bitdefender report confirms scams are now hitting Australians across every channel: email, SMS, phone calls, and social media simultaneously. Chinese and North Korean threat groups are also actively targeting Asia-Pacific organisations, meaning Australian businesses remain in scope.

Stay alert to unsolicited messages on any platform, and if you receive something unexpected — even from a familiar brand — go directly to the official website rather than clicking any links.

featured.title: Privacy Commissioner finds Optus breached privacy in White Pages listing matter
featured.quote: Australian Privacy Commissioner finds major telco Optus violated privacy laws in significant enforcement action.
